channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: North Korea's Kim vows steadfast support for Russia’s war in Ukraine
item.description: SEOUL, South Korea (AP) — North Korean leader Kim Jong Un vowed his country will “invariably support” Russia’s war in Ukraine as he met Russia's defense chief, the North’s state media reported Saturday.
item.dc:creator: HYUNG-JIN KIM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: LIVE: Lake Effect Snow Warning; emergencies declared and highways closed
item.description: (WJET/WFXP) — As we close out Black Friday, many areas throughout the region are seeing well over a foot of snow and might see at least another foot overnight. The snow falls heavy at times causing travel concerns with I-90 and the I-79 corridor impacted.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, NewsNation

item.title: Canadian Prime Minister Trudeau flies to Florida to meet with Trump after tariffs threat
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau flew to Florida on Friday to have dinner with President-elect Donald Trump at his Mar-a-Lago club after Trump threatened to impose sweeping tariffs on Canadian products.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES and FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Emboldened 'manosphere' accelerates threats and demeaning language toward women after US election
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — In the days after the presidential election, Sadie Perez began carrying pepper spray with her around campus. Her mom also ordered her and her sister a self-defense kit that included keychain spikes, a hidden knife key and a personal alarm.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINE FERNANDO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Woman accused of knife attack on family at Thanksgiving
item.description: UPDATE: The suspect, 55-year-old Lachunda Johnson has been charged with Aggravated Assault/DV, Aggravated Assault, and Domestic Assault, according to Memphis Police. MPD says Johnson is the mother of one of the stabbing victims. *** MEMPHIS, Tenn.
item.dc:creator: David Royer, NewsNation

item.title: 2 San Jose men arrested after joyriding in stolen vehicle: police
item.description: (KRON) -- Two San Jose residents were arrested after possessing a stolen vehicle, according to the Benicia Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, NewsNation

item.title: Amazon worker strike: 5 things to know
item.description: The strike, dubbed "Make Amazon Pay," has planned demonstrations in more than 20 countries including the United States, and the protests are slated to last through Cyber Monday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Easy thanksgiving leftovers recipes, ideas to reduce your food waste
item.description: Thanksgiving leftover recipes include treats, soups, and turkey broth. Other common ideas include salads, sandwiches, pies, and casseroles.
item.dc:creator: Isabella Cheng, NewsNation

item.title: Most Americans worried about affording gifts this year
item.description: Most Americans are worried about affording gifts this year but that doesn't mean they're cutting back on spending.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Lake-effect snow heading for New York state could disrupt travel and football
item.description: BUFFALO, N.Y. (AP) — Black Friday was giving way to a white weekend in parts of New York state, with the first big snow of the season threatening to bury towns along lakes Erie and Ontario during a hectic holiday travel and shopping weekend.
item.dc:creator: CAROLYN THOMPSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US-based model, husband and child kidnapped and held 12 hours after leaving restaurant in Brazil: reports
item.description: A Brazilian model who lives in the U.S. was kidnapped along with her husband and child in her home country this week and held captive for 12 hours.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: First popularly elected Black mayor in New England, Thirman Milner, has died at 91
item.description: HARTFORD, Conn. (AP) — Former Hartford Mayor Thirman Milner, the first popularly elected Black mayor in New England, has died, the Connecticut NAACP said on Friday. He was 91.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 2 Tren de Aragua members tied to viral Aurora video arrested in NYC
item.description: Two Venezuelan gang members who are allegedly tied to a video at a Colorado apartment complex have been arrested.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: Ranking the Democrats: Here's who the party could nominate next as president
item.description: Democrats are licking their wounds after Vice President Harris’s defeat to President-elect Trump, but already are looking toward who might lead their party in a 2028 presidential contest. It’s a fight that looks wide open.
item.dc:creator: Amie Parnes, NewsNation

item.title: From T-shirts to thongs, how indie film merchandise became a hot commodity
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — On a recent Saturday afternoon, hundreds of “Anora” fans lined up for hours on Los Angeles' Melrose Avenue, hoping to snag exclusive merchandise inspired by Sean Baker’s latest film about a stripper who marries the son of a Russian oligarch.
item.dc:creator: KRYSTA FAURIA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Retailers coax Black Friday shoppers into stores with big discounts and giveaways
item.description: Retailers in the U.S. have used giveaways and bigger-than expected discounts to reward shoppers who ventured out on Black Friday.
item.dc:creator: Anne D'Innocenzio, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade: Big balloons, wet weather and 21 protesters arrested
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade marched, soared and roared into its second century on Thursday despite a drenching rain and a brief disruption from pro-Palestinian demonstrators.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Returning from a Thanksgiving trip? Watch out for rain, snow
item.description: Travelers who spoke to NewsNation Thursday said the TSA was prepared for the number of passengers coming their way.
item.dc:creator: Xavier Walton, NewsNation

item.title: Photos: 100 years of the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade
item.description: The parade in New York City, presented by department store chain Macy's, was first held in 1924 under the heading "Macy's Christmas Parade" to promote holiday sales and spotlight the newly expanded and, at the time, largest in the world Herald Square store in Manhattan.
item.dc:creator: Nicole Caldwell, Stacker, ABC 4

item.title: From disaster to hope: A Vermont family thankful for community support after flood destroyed home
item.description: PEACHAM, Vt. (AP) — The last thing John and Jenny Mackenzie saw as they fled their Vermont home with their daughters, dog and two guinea pigs last summer was their cars upended and propelled away by rushing flood waters.
item.dc:creator: LISA RATHKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: See the 10 worst airports for on-time Thanksgiving travel: report
item.description: Depending on what airport your friends or relatives are flying out of, you may want to show a little extra compassion this Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, Fox 5

item.title: Sean 'Diddy' Combs denied bail for a third time
item.description: He was denied bail in September and earlier this month when the judge deemed Combs a flight risk because of his money and connections.
item.dc:creator: Katie Smith, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: SLC Airport among most on-time airports for holiday travel: report
item.description: Depending on what airport your friends or relatives are flying out of, you may want to show a little extra compassion this Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, ABC 4

item.title: Democrat Derek Tran defeats GOP Rep. Michelle Steel in Southern California swing House district
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Democrat Derek Tran ousted Republican U.S. Rep. Michelle Steel in a Southern California House district Wednesday that was specifically drawn to give Asian Americans a stronger voice on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. BLOOD, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Oregon tribe has hunting and fishing rights restored under a long-sought court ruling
item.description: LINCOLN CITY, Ore. (AP) — Drumming made the floor vibrate and singing filled the conference room of the Chinook Winds Casino Resort in Lincoln City, on the Oregon coast, as hundreds in tribal regalia danced in a circle.
item.dc:creator: CLAIRE RUSH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Boulder Police address JonBenét Ramsey's case after Netflix docuseries premieres
item.description: Without specifically addressing the docuseries, Boulder Police called many of the claims in the show "completely false.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, KRON4

item.title: Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade in NYC: See the balloons inflate before the big day
item.description: The 98th annual Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade will take over Manhattan Thursday morning, lining the streets with extravagant balloons and fanfare.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: PHOTOS: More than $18M in fake Gibson guitars seized by U.S. Customs and Border Protection
item.description: U.S. Customs and Border Protection seized more than 3,000 fake Gibson guitars worth nearly $19 million, had they been genuine.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, Fox 5

item.title: Judge finds New York City in contempt over jail conditions, moves closer to a federal takeover
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A judge on Wednesday found New York City in contempt for failing to staunch violence and brutality at its jails, a scathing ruling that puts the troubled Rikers Island jail complex on the verge of a federal takeover. In a written decision, U.S.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, MICHAEL R. SISAK and JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How to avoid starting 'phantom traffic jams' this holiday travel season
item.description: Bumper-to-bumper traffic is a regular occurrence for holiday travelers. However, researchers with Vanderbilt University hope findings from a large traffic study can help.
item.dc:creator: Kori Johnson, Fox 5

item.title: Wendy Williams 'permanently incapacitated' as dementia progresses, guardian says
item.description: Wendy Williams, longtime host of the daytime talk show "The Wendy Williams Show," is "permanently incapacitated," according to her guardian.
item.dc:creator: Justyn Melrose, Fox 5

item.title: This pyramid in Utah is a winery, a temple, and home to the mummy of a religious leader
item.description: Did you know? There's a pyramid in Salt Lake City that is a winery, a temple, and the home of the Summum religion.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: A California woman was called into work on her day off. She left a lottery winner
item.description: Nobody likes being called into work on their day off. But for one California woman, a last-minute call-in would ultimately change her life for the better.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KRON4

item.title: Trump nominees targeted in series of threats, spokesperson says
item.description: (The Hill) - Multiple nominees and appointees tapped to serve in President-elect Trump’s incoming administration were targeted with threats this week, a spokesperson for the transition said Wednesday, though it was unclear how many were affected.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KRON4

item.title: What dynamic pricing means for Black Friday shopping
item.description: If it feels like prices are on a roller coaster ride during the holidays, you’re not imagining things.
item.dc:creator: Amanda Barroso, ABC 4

item.title: Israel, Lebanon's Hezbollah agree to a ceasefire to end nearly 14 months of fighting
item.description: Israel approved a United States-brokered ceasefire agreement with Lebanon's Hezbollah on Tuesday, setting the stage for an end to nearly 14 months of fighting linked to the ongoing war in the Gaza Strip.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: First right whales of season gorge on critical food off Massachusetts, giving hope for a strong year
item.description: Scientists who study a critically endangered species of whale that lives off New England said encouraging early signs suggest the animals could have a strong season for feeding and breeding.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, ABC 4
